title: FrameVoid
description: Borderless fullscreen for Minecraft 26.1. No borders, no GPU switches, instant alt-tab.
body:
# FrameVoid

**True borderless fullscreen for Minecraft 26.1.**  
No GPU switches. No black flashes. Instant alt-tab without minimizing.

## What it does

Minecraft's built-in fullscreen uses exclusive fullscreen mode, which forces a GPU context switch every time you alt-tab. FrameVoid replaces it with a borderless windowed mode that covers your entire screen, so switching to other apps is instant and the game never minimizes.

## Features

- Automatic borderless fullscreen when entering fullscreen mode
- Window stays visible when alt-tabbing. No minimize, no black flash
- Other windows can be brought to the foreground normally
- Action bar notification when borderless mode activates or deactivates
- Lightweight, no config screen needed, just press F11

## Requirements

- Latest Fabric Loader
- Minecraft Java Edition Fabric 26.1+
- Latest Fabric API
